subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O My handmaiden! We have seen and heard thy letter attain unto the hearing of the Desire of the world. Render thou praise unto the Sovereign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا امتی نامه ات باصغاء مقصود عالم فائز دیدیم و شنیدیم حمد کن سلطان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @belief and denial, @knowledge; recognition of God, @creation of the world, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
